programmes.show_description: The hottest Clubland belters from the noughties! Burn up the carpet and dance yourself silly. It's time to party!
Let's go way back with some classic throwback hits, long forgotten beats and some good old fashioned rave anthems!
DJ Andi Durrant gives us a deep dive into some of the most iconic samples in dance music. Legendary vocals, elusive disco grooves and some of his favourite hidden gems!

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
Top one, nice one, get sorted! Join Steph Hirst as she takes us back, way back to a time of smiley faces, glow sticks and banging tunes. Get Ready for 30 Proper Old Skool Ravers!
Let's go way back with some classic throwback hits, long forgotten beats and some good old fashioned rave anthems!
Will the Chemical Brothers be out of control, or will Fatboy Slim use his weapon of choice. Electro Beats vs Big Beat, who wins. You Decide!
Join Nick Chicane for a deep dive into Balearic Beats. From day parties at Space to Cafe Del Mar sunsets and pulsing nights at Privilege revisit the tunes that defined an era.
Dive into a world of uplifting melodies, driving beats and breakdowns to give you shivers! This is Euphoria at its finest.
30 tracks. One legendary era. Join Utah Saints and experience the early 90s warehouse rave scene with their ultimate setlist. This is for the Old Skool massive!
From the fields to the clubs! Relive the rave culture with iconic tracks that defined a generation. Pure energy and essential anthems only. Ravers Unite!
The weekend has landed so let's get it started the Clubland way. No less than four hours of 90s floor fillers and party starters! Over 50 fab anthems from 1990 to 1999.
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Build ups to die for, Breakdowns to cry for! These are the 50 biggest Euphoric tunes of all time. Turn this up and get ready for the drop!

No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and classic tracks of the noughties!

programmes.show_name: What's In Andi Durrant's DJ Box?
programmes.show_description: Sample hunting with DJ Andi Durrant. We take deep dive into his DJ Box for those legendary vocals, pumpin' disco grooves and hard to find samples.
